summary.zhHant: Black Bean Enchilada-Style Bake is a practical two-person Mexican Latin American dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.

detail.zhHant: Set out Black beans, Tortillas, Mushrooms, Lime, Garlic, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.
detail.yue: Set out Black beans, Tortillas, Mushrooms, Lime, Garlic, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.
detail.en: Set out Black beans, Tortillas, Mushrooms, Lime, Garlic, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.

detail.zhHant: Toss Black beans with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.
detail.yue: Toss Black beans with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.
detail.en: Toss Black beans with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.

detail.zhHant: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.
detail.yue: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.
detail.en: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.

detail.zhHant: Rest Black Bean Enchilada-Style Bake for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
detail.yue: Rest Black Bean Enchilada-Style Bake for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
detail.en: Rest Black Bean Enchilada-Style Bake for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
